title: Tasty Thick Russian Chicken Pilaf
description: A funky and dense Russian dish featuring chicken breasts in a miso marinate, perfect for kids and flexitarian friendly diets. It is a hearty and flavorful meal that combines the richness of chicken and miso with the comfort of pilaf.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together miso paste, vegetable oil, salt, and black pepper to make the marinate.
Add the chicken breasts to the marinate and mix well to coat.
Let the chicken marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat and cook the chicken until browned on both sides.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the skillet and cook until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the grated carrots to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the uncooked rice to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth to the skillet and bring to a boil.
Cover the skillet with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the liquid is absorbed and the rice is tender.
